title: Acuant Liveness Result
description: Schema for the response from the Acuant Passive Liveness API.

LivenessAssessment.description: Liveness assessment outcome. Live = real person detected; NotLive = spoof/attack detected; PoorQuality = image insufficient; Error = processing failure.

Score.description: Confidence score for the liveness assessment (0-100).

TransactionId.description: Unique identifier for this liveness check transaction.

Error.description: Error message if LivenessAssessment is Error.

ErrorCode.description: Numeric error code if processing failed.
